race.comment: SILK LACE (7) opened this prep with a couple of stylish wins over 900m at Newcastle then tackled the same course and distance last time when she closed hard but left the run a touch too late. Very fit filly who should relish the extra 100m this afternoon. INDECISIVE (1) was having his second run after a 15-month absence when an impressive winner over this course and distance recently. Has to shoulder 61kgs from an awkward gate but there is improvement to come so another win is on the cards. SPARTUS (3) drops back to far more suitable company and shapes as one of the main contenders. ZOUKERINO (10) has won second up previously and appears the next in line.
